creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

And now: Update to 2.10.1:

diff -r -u databases/cego/Makefile /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile
--- databases/cego/Makefile	2011-06-20 23:04:44.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile	2011-06-24 13:15:04.000000000 +0200
@@ -2,10 +2,10 @@

 # Whom:					Kurt Jaeger <fbsd-ports@opsec.eu>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/databases/cego/Makefile,v 1.21 2011/06/20 16:53:58 sylvio Exp $
+# $FreeBSD: ports/databases/cego/Makefile,v 1.20 2011/05/28 07:16:21 culot Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	cego
-PORTVERSION=	2.9.6
+PORTVERSION=	2.10.1
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.lemke-it.com/
 
diff -r -u databases/cego/distinfo /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo
--- databases/cego/distinfo	2011-06-20 23:04:44.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo	2011-06-24 13:15:10.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

-SIZE (cego-2.9.6.tar.gz) = 653974
